idea-plugin.name: Jira Branch Opener
idea-plugin.description: Reads the current Git branch name, extracts a Jira issue key (e.g. FSN-123), and opens the corresponding Jira issue in your default browser using a configurable Jira site URL (defaulting to https://n-able.atlassian.net). Configure the Jira site in Settings | Tools | Jira Branch Opener. Supports builds with Java 25 toolchains.

action.description: Extracts a Jira issue key from the current Git branch and opens it in the browser
